channel.title: nRF52 on Home Smart Mesh
channel.description: Recent content in nRF52 on Home Smart Mesh

item.title: Thread SensorTag
item.description: Networks / Thread Frameworks / CHIP Overview # nRF52840 on a MS88SF2 module. i²C bus scl P1.13 and sda P1.15 Light sensor VEMLS6030 @0x48 MS8607 with relative humidity @0x40, pressure and temperature @0x76 Reset button P0.

item.title: UWB DWM1001 dev
item.description: Networks / Ultra Wide Band RTLS Development Board # DWM1001C Module STM32F072 as J-Link OB debugger USB and battery conenctors Raspberry PI Header connector User Leds buttons product page datasheet user manual DWM1001C Module # DW1000 Transciever TWR-RTLS : Two Way Ranging - Real Time Location System nRF52832 for a Bluetooth API LIS2DH12TR STM 3-Axis Motion Detector The product page includes datasheets, schematics, firmware,… product page DW1000 Transciever # IEEE 802.

item.title: UWB DWM3001 cdk
item.description: Networks / Ultra Wide Band RTLS Development Board # product page DWM3001C Module STM32 as J-Link OB debugger x2 micro USB for nRF Data and J-Link Program/serial battery conenctor Raspberry PI Header connector User Leds and buttons DWM3001C Module # product page DW3110 Transciever nRF52833 Thread, Zigbee and Bluetooth (Mesh, Direction finding) IMU : Inertial Motion Unit TWR and TDoA : Two Way Ranging and Time Difference of Arrival nRF52833 DW3110 Transciever # product page 2 RF bands : channel 5 (6.

item.title: Simple Mesh SensorTag
item.description: Networks / Simple Mesh Frameworks / Raspi IoT Tindie Product Page Concept # It is possible to mount either CR2032 or CR2477 Hardware # board render

item.title: nRF52840 USB dongle
item.description: Product Page nRF52840 ARM M4 64 MHz 1024 KB ROM - 256 KB RAM Bluetooth 5, Mesh 802.15.4, Thread, Zigbee USB 2 GetStarted) Applications # custom mesh coordinator nRF52840 Dongle # Pinout # Serial Wire Debug # the usb dongle is referred to as PCA10059 which in projects usually shifts the app to offset 0x1000 as openbootloader usage is expected With serial wire debug, it’s possible to flash applications at same address as the PCA10056 which is at address 0x0000 recovering the openbootloader mode would then require to reflash the MBR with any nRF SDK project make flash_mbr LEDS # LED1 Green : P0.

item.title: nRF52832 UART dongle
item.description: Board # A usb dongle from the market that includes a 2104 serial to usb converter. Keyword search on shopping websites : nRF52832 USB dongle. Aka “nRF52832-YJ-17017-USB-UART” Software # RF to Serial Gateway # The node connected through serial port will report messages in text format Local Events Upon startup such message is sent nodeid:75;channel:10;reset:1 Listening Upon activation of the uicr config is_listening the node starts acting as a gatewy that will report messages through serial in text mode
